name: onejobs-crm-fullstack
description: OneJobs CRM - Full Stack (React + Node.js + PostgreSQL)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.deploy:render: echo 'Push to GitHub, then connect repo on render.com'
